proposed_conditioned_material_variables.crevice_mitigation_strategy: The specific procedure, coating (e.g., lacquer), or physical masking method applied to the specimen-mount interface or sample edges to suppress premature crevice corrosion, ensuring the measured breakdown potential accurately reflects localized pitting.

proposed_experiment_variables.electrolyte_ph: The explicitly measured or controlled acidity/alkalinity (pH) of the bulk electrolyte, which acts as a critical independent thermodynamic variable strongly influencing passive film stability and the resulting pitting potential.
proposed_experiment_variables.solution_redox_potential: The baseline redox potential (E_redox) of the testing solution itself, typically measured using an inert indicator electrode (e.g., platinum), which defines the bulk oxidizing nature of the environment independently from the working electrode's corrosion potential.
